name: Gilled Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the salmon on a well-greased broiler pan.
2. In a blender, combine and blend 1/3 cup olive oil, garlic, parsley, dill weed, and salt until smooth.
3. Stir in bread crumbs and set aside.
4. Brush each salmon steak with butter.
5. Broil the steaks about 4 inches from the heat for 8 minutes or until they flake easily when tested with a fork.
6. Spread about 2 tablespoons of garlic mixture on each salmon steak.
7. Return the steaks to the broiler and broil an additional 1-2 minutes or until lightly browned.
